nodes.arabic: تَبَارَكَ الَّذِي بِيَدِهِ الْمُلْكُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
nodes.english: Blessed is He in whose hand is dominion, and He is over all things competent.

nodes.arabic: وَلِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا بِرَبِّهِمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ ۖ وَبِئْسَ الْمَصِيرُ
nodes.english: And for those who disbelieved in their Lord is the punishment of Hell, and wretched is the destination.

nodes.arabic: وَأَسِرُّوا قَوْلَكُمْ أَوِ اجْهَرُوا بِهِ ۖ إِنَّهُ عَلِيمٌ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُورِ
nodes.english: And conceal your speech or publicize it; indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts.

nodes.arabic: أَأَمِنْتُمْ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاءِ أَنْ يَخْسِفَ بِكُمُ الْأَرْضَ...
nodes.english: Do you feel secure that He who [holds authority] in the heaven would not cause the earth to swallow you...

nodes.arabic: قُلْ أَرَأَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَصْبَحَ مَاؤُكُمْ غَوْرًا فَمَنْ يَأْتِيكُمْ بِمَاءٍ مَعِينٍ
nodes.english: Say, 'Have you considered: if your water was to become sunken [into the earth], then who could bring you flowing water?'

links.context: Just as He holds absolute dominion over the heavens (V1), He controls the literal life-giving water of the earth (V30).
Warning of the unseen fire (V6) mirrors the warning of physical destruction via the earth (V16).
